reference: I had a full knee replacement four months ago. I am now dealing with internal scar tissue around or under my kneecap. My doctor suggests that surgery might be needed. However, this would be done after it has been a year since the surgery due to the risk of infection. If this is done, what prevents me from developing internal scar tissue again?
text: I had a full knee replacement four months ago. I am now dealing with internal scar tissue around or under my kneecap. My doctor suggests that surgery might be needed. However, this would be done after it has been a year since the surgery due to the risk of infection. If this is done, what prevents me from developing internal scar tissue again?
